message: feat(dashboard): add native Zig metrics addon with CI builds

files.patch:
@@ -235,7 +235,70 @@ jobs:
           git pull --rebase origin main
           git push
 
+  check-dashboard:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    outputs:
+      should_publish: ${{ steps.check.outputs.should_publish }}
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Check if dashboard needs publishing
+        id: check
+        run: |
+          cd packages/dashboard
+          LOCAL_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
+          NPM_VERSION=$(npm view termweb-dashboard version 2>/dev/null || echo "0.0.0")
+          echo "Local: $LOCAL_VERSION, npm: $NPM_VERSION"
+          if [ "$LOCAL_VERSION" != "$NPM_VERSION" ]; then
+            echo "should_publish=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "should_publish=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+  build-dashboard-native:
+    needs: check-dashboard
+    if: needs.check-dashboard.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: macos-latest
+            target: aarch64-macos
+            name: darwin-arm64
+          - os: macos-latest
+            target: x86_64-macos
+            name: darwin-x64
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-linux-gnu
+            name: linux-x64
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: aarch64-linux-gnu
+            name: linux-arm64
+
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Zig
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - name: Build dashboard native addon
+        run: |
+          cd packages/dashboard/native
+          zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dtarget=${{ matrix.target }}
+          mv zig-out/lib/metrics.node metrics-${{ matrix.name }}.node
+          ls -la
+
+      - name: Upload native addon
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dashboard-native-${{ matrix.name }}
+          path: packages/dashboard/native/metrics-${{ matrix.name }}.node
+
   publish-dashboard:
+    needs: [check-dashboard, build-dashboard-native]
+    if: needs.check-dashboard.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
       contents: read
@@ -244,6 +307,16 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Download all native addons
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: packages/dashboard/native/prebuilt
+          pattern: dashboard-native-*
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: List prebuilt binaries
+        run: ls -la packages/dashboard/native/prebuilt/
+
       - name: Setup pnpm
         uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
         with:

@@ -29,15 +29,26 @@ Opens a real-time system monitoring dashboard in your terminal with:
 
 ## Keyboard Controls
 
+**Main view:**
+- `c` - CPU details
+- `m` - Memory details
+- `n` - Network details
+- `d` - Disk details
+- `p` - Process list
+
 **Disk view:**
-- `Arrow keys` - Navigate folders
-- `Enter` - Drill into folder
-- `Backspace` - Go up one level
+- `Tab/Shift+Tab` - Select folder in treemap
+- `Enter` - Navigate to path in textbox
+- `Ctrl+Enter` - Drill into selected folder
+- `Ctrl+Backspace` - Go up one directory level
+- `Ctrl+D` - Delete selected folder (with Y/N confirmation)
+- `Escape` - Return to main view
 
 **Process view:**
 - `Arrow keys` - Select process
-- `Tab` - Change sort column
-- `Ctrl+K` - Kill selected process
+- `Tab/Shift+Tab` - Change sort column
+- `Ctrl+K` - Kill selected process (with Y/N confirmation)
+- Search box filters by name, PID, or port
 
 **General:**
 - `Escape` - Return to main view
